name: date-picker
title: Date Picker
description: A date picker combining calendar, popover, and button.

files.content: "use client" import * as React from "react" import { format } from "date-fns" import { CalendarIcon } from "lucide-react" import { Calendar } from "@/registry/radk/ui/calendar" import { Button } from "@/registry/radk/ui/button" import { Popover, PopoverContent, PopoverTrigger } from "@/registry/radk/ui/popover" import { cn } from "@/lib/utils" interface DatePickerProps { date?: Date onDateChange?: (date: Date | undefined) => void placeholder?: string className?: string } function DatePicker({ date, onDateChange, placeholder = "Pick a date", className }: DatePickerProps) { return ( ) } export { DatePicker }
